name: ospec
desc: Spec-driven, agentic workflow framework for AI coding agents. Turn a request into a verifiable goal loop — plan, act, verify — with durable specs and evidence …
descFull: Spec-driven, agentic workflow framework for AI coding agents. Turn a request into a verifiable goal loop — plan, act, verify — with durable specs and evidence in your repo. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, and plain CLI.
